prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, warm wood textures, lively guild background. Kaelen Ironheart, a young adult in a guild cloak and leather armor, presents a sealed quest parcel to Sora Oakspire, a quartermaster in a vest and sash, using both hands. Clear, fluid handoff motion, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous guild hall shot, same characters. Sora Oakspire accepts the sealed parcel from Kaelen Ironheart, both characters bow slightly in mutual respect, the handoff completes clearly, warm anime RPG lighting, no text, no watermark.
